AiProvider._comment_openai: For OpenAI: set Provider=OpenAI, ModelId=gpt-4o, and your ApiKey
AiProvider._comment_azure: For Azure OpenAI: set Provider=AzureOpenAI, DeploymentName, Endpoint, and ApiKey
AiProvider._comment_ollama: For Ollama: set Provider=Ollama, ModelId=llama3.1, Endpoint=http://localhost:11434
